name: Southwestern Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Stir together the crushed chips and melted margarine in a small bowl; press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake for 15 minutes.
4. Beat the cream cheese and eggs in a large mixing bowl at medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
5. Mix in the shredded cheese, chopped green chilies, sour cream, yellow pepper, green onion, tomatoes, and black olives; pour over the crust.
6. Bake for 30 minutes.
7. Spread the remaining sour cream over the cheesecake.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
9. Chill thoroughly.
10. Top with remaining ingredients just before serving.
